title: Ask for an update on all tasks not updated in 7 days
excerpt: Looking for a way to generate a comment in all tasks asking for an update from the assigned person if the task has not been updated in 7 days.

posts.author: Pio_Egan (Pio Egan)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for a way to generate a comment in all tasks asking for an update from the assigned person if the task has not been updated in 7 days.
